mapper.select: SELECT coupon_id AS couponId, coupon_name AS couponName, coupon_type AS couponType, discount_amount AS discountAmount, discount_rate AS discountRate, DATE_FORMAT(start_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS startDate, DATE_FORMAT(end_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS endDate FROM coupons WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND CURDATE() BETWEEN start_date AND end_date ORDER BY coupon_id DESC

SELECT uc.user_coupon_id AS userCouponId, uc.user_id AS userId, uc.coupon_id AS couponId, c.coupon_name AS couponName, c.coupon_type AS couponType, c.discount_amount AS discountAmount, c.discount_rate AS discountRate, uc.use_yn AS useYn, DATE_FORMAT(c.start_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS startDate, DATE_FORMAT(c.end_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS endDate FROM user_coupons uc INNER JOIN coupons c ON uc.coupon_id = c.coupon_id WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY uc.user_coupon_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_coupons ( user_id, coupon_id, use_yn, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{couponId}, 'N', NOW() )
